_**Agent (default)**_

This codebase uses **Vertical Slice Architecture** with handlers and DTOs in `SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application`, thin Minimal API endpoint classes in `SchaerbeekMunicipality.Api`, and **typed HttpClient wrappers** (not Refit) in `SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web`. Phase 16 (`docs/phases/phase-16-person-file.md`) is planned but not implemented yet — the patterns below are what you should mirror.

---

## 1. Application layer handlers & response DTOs

### Folder layout
Each slice lives under:

```
src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/{FeatureArea}/{SliceName}/
  ├── {SliceName}Handler.cs
  ├── {SliceName}Response.cs      # often nested record DTOs in same file
  ├── {SliceName}Request.cs       # for commands/queries with input
  └── {SliceName}Validator.cs     # FluentValidation when needed
```

**Reference slices:**

| Slice | Path |
|-------|------|
| Reporting GET | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Reporting/GetMunicipalityReport/` |
| NR search | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/SearchNationalRegister/` |
| Case detail GET | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/GetRegistrationCase/` |
| Case list GET | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/ListRegistrationCases/` |

### Handler pattern
- **Primary constructor** DI (`public sealed class XxxHandler(...)`).
- Single **`Handle(...)`** method returning a response record (or `IReadOnlyList<T>` for lists).
- **No MediatR** — handlers registered explicitly in `DependencyInjection.cs`.
- DTOs are **`sealed record`** types colocated with the slice; nested DTOs for sections (see `GetMunicipalityReportResponse.cs`, `RegistrationCaseDetailDto.cs`).

**Read/query handler variants:**

```csharp
// Aggregated read (Reporting) — auth first, compose from repos, return composed DTO
authorization.EnsureCanViewReports(currentOfficer);
// ... query multiple repos, project to GetMunicipalityReportResponse

// Search (NR) — validate, map request → domain criteria, enrich results
await validator.ValidateAndThrowAsync(request, cancellationToken);
var matches = await nationalRegisterRepository.SearchAsync(criteria, cancellationToken);

// Single-entity GET (cases) — auth via *Authorization + *Guard, map to detail DTO
authorization.EnsureCanView(currentOfficer);
var entity = await caseGuard.GetForViewAsync(caseId, cancellationToken);
// ... load related data, map to RegistrationCaseDetailDto
```

**404 convention:** Guards throw `KeyNotFoundException` (mapped to HTTP 404 by middleware). Example: `RegistrationCaseGuard.GetRequiredAsync` in `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/RegistrationCaseGuard.cs`.

**DI registration:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/DependencyInjection.cs` — add `services.AddScoped<GetPersonFileHandler>()` alongside existing handlers (lines 180–181 show Reporting registration).

---

## 2. API endpoints (Minimal API)

### Structure
```
src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Api/Features/{FeatureArea}/
  ├── {FeatureArea}Endpoints.cs          # MapGroup + route wiring
  └── {SliceName}/{SliceName}Endpoint.cs # static Handle method
```

**Group registration** in `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Api/MunicipalApiHostExtensions.cs` (line 54: `app.MapReportingEndpoints()`).

**Reporting group** (`/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Api/Features/Reporting/ReportingEndpoints.cs`):

```csharp
var group = app.MapGroup("/api/reports").WithTags("Reporting");
group.MapGet("/municipality", GetMunicipalityReportEndpoint.Handle)
    .WithName("GetMunicipalityReport")
    .Produces<GetMunicipalityReportResponse>();
```

**GET by id** (`GetRegistrationCaseEndpoint.cs`):

```csharp
public static async Task<IResult> Handle(Guid id, GetRegistrationCaseHandler handler, CancellationToken ct)
{
    var detail = await handler.Handle(new RegistrationCaseId(id), ct);
    return detail is null ? Results.NotFound() : Results.Ok(detail);
}
```

**GET with query params** — NR search uses `[AsParameters] SearchNationalRegisterRequest` + optional FluentValidation at endpoint level (`SearchNationalRegisterEndpoint.cs`). Registration route: `GET /api/registration/national-register/search`.

**Exception → HTTP:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Api/Middleware/DomainExceptionMiddleware.cs` maps `KeyNotFoundException` → 404, `UnauthorizedAccessException` → 403.

---

## 3. Web layer: API clients, pages, navigation

### Not Refit — typed HttpClient + base class
- Base: `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Api/MunicipalApiClientBase.cs`
- Applies demo officer headers from `ICurrentOfficer`
- Helpers: `GetJsonAsync<T>`, `BuildQuery(...)` for query strings
- Registration: `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Api/Registration/RegistrationApiClient.cs`
- Reporting (new feature area pattern): `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Api/Reporting/IReportingApi.cs` + `ReportingApiClient.cs`

**Register in** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Api/DependencyInjection.cs`:

```csharp
RegisterClient<IPersonFileApi, PersonFileApiClient>(services, environment);
```

**Client method patterns:**

```csharp
// GET by id
GetJsonAsync<RegistrationCaseDetailDto>($"{BasePath}/cases/{id}", cancellationToken);

// GET with query string (NR search)
var query = BuildQuery(("GivenName", request.GivenName), ("FamilyName", request.FamilyName), ...);
GetJsonAsync<SearchNationalRegisterResponse>($"{BasePath}/national-register/search{query}", cancellationToken);
```

**Pages:**
- Route: `@page "/administration/reports"` in `MunicipalityReportsPage.razor`
- Inject `IReportingApi`, load in lifecycle, use design-system components (`AppPage`, `AppStatisticCard`, etc.)
- **Role gate:** `RegistrationRoleGate` with `AllowedRoles` — `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Components/RegistrationRoleGate.razor`

**Navigation:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Components/Layout/MainLayout.razor` builds role-specific `AppNavItem` lists (PopulationOfficer gets "Reports" at `/administration/reports`).

**NR search UI** reuses shared form component:
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Municipal/Components/NationalRegisterSearchForm.razor`
- Dialog wrapper: `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Components/NationalRegisterSearchDialog.razor` — calls `RegistrationApi.SearchNationalRegisterAsync`, maps to UI models.

**Blazor concurrency rule** (`.cursor/rules/blazor-ef-core.mdc`): pages own data loading; finish all awaits before assigning state that re-renders children.

---

## 4. Integration test patterns for GET endpoints

**Test host:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/tests/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Integration.Tests/MunicipalAppFactory.cs` — in-memory SQLite, `DemoOfficerTestClient` for HTTP headers.

### Pattern A — Handler-level (most common)
Used by NR search and most GET tests:

```csharp
await using var factory = new MunicipalAppFactory();
await using var scope = factory.Services.CreateAsyncScope();
RegistrationTestHelpers.SetRole(scope.ServiceProvider, OfficerRole.PopulationOfficer);

var handler = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<SearchNationalRegisterHandler>();
var response = await handler.Handle(new SearchNationalRegisterRequest(...), CancellationToken.None);
response.Matches.Should()...
```

**NR search tests:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/tests/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Integration.Tests/Features/Registration/NationalRegisterTests.cs`

**Reporting tests:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/tests/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Integration.Tests/Features/Reporting/MunicipalityReportTests.cs`

### Pattern B — HTTP-level (auth + status codes)
From `MunicipalityReportTests.cs`:

```csharp
using var client = factory.CreateApiClient();
var request = new HttpRequestMessage(HttpMethod.Get, "/api/reports/municipality?months=12");
DemoOfficerTestClient.ApplyOfficerHeaders(request, OfficerRole.BackOfficeOfficer);
var response = await client.SendAsync(request);
response.IsSuccessStatusCode.Should().BeTrue(); // or StatusCode.Forbidden
```

### Pattern C — Auth boundary tests
`/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/tests/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Integration.Tests/Features/Registration/RoleBoundariesAndCaseLockingTests.cs`:

```csharp
var act = () => getHandler.Handle(caseId, CancellationToken.None);
await act.Should().ThrowAsync<UnauthorizedAccessException>();
```

### Pattern D — Seed workflow data, assert read model
Reporting's `CompletedRegistration_IsCountedInReportSummary` builds a full case via existing handlers, then calls the GET handler.

**For PersonFile tests** (from phase-16 spec):
- Registered person from happy path → consistent identity + case links
- Unknown NR → 404 (`KeyNotFoundException`)
- Person with no cases → header only, empty cases section

---

## 5. Authorization patterns for read endpoints

Three styles in use:

| Style | Used by | Mechanism |
|-------|---------|-----------|
| **Feature Authorization class** | Reporting, all case workflows | `{Feature}Authorization` with `CanXxx(role)` + `EnsureCanXxx(ICurrentOfficer)` throwing `UnauthorizedAccessException` |
| **Guard + Authorization** | GetRegistrationCase, GetChangeOfAddressCase | Guard loads entity + calls `EnsureCanView`; edit paths use `EnsureCanEdit` |
| **No auth in handler** | SearchNationalRegister | Only FluentValidation; any officer role can search if they reach the API |

**Reporting auth** — `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Reporting/ReportingAuthorization.cs`:
- `PopulationOfficer` and `BackOfficeOfficer` can view reports
- Called at top of handler: `authorization.EnsureCanViewReports(currentOfficer)`

**Case read auth** — `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/RegistrationCaseAuthorization.cs`:
- `CanViewCase` → only `PopulationOfficer`
- Handler: `authorization.EnsureCanView(currentOfficer)` before loading

**Web-side defense in depth:** `RegistrationRoleGate` redirects disallowed roles; API still enforces via handler auth.

**HTTP mapping:** `UnauthorizedAccessException` → 403 via `DomainExceptionMiddleware`.

---

## Concrete blueprint: GetPersonFile, SearchPersonFile, ListPersonCases

Phase 16 spec: `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/docs/phases/phase-16-person-file.md`  
Routes planned: `/persons/{personId}` or `/register/persons/{nrNumber}`

### Recommended file tree

```
Application/Features/PersonFile/
  PersonFileAuthorization.cs
  GetPersonFile/
    GetPersonFileHandler.cs
    GetPersonFileResponse.cs          # header, identity, domicile, household sections
  SearchPersonFile/
    SearchPersonFileHandler.cs        # wraps NR search + adds PersonId/deep-link
    SearchPersonFileRequest.cs        # reuse SearchNationalRegisterRequest shape or alias
    SearchPersonFileResponse.cs
  ListPersonCases/
    ListPersonCasesHandler.cs
    ListPersonCasesResponse.cs        # PersonCaseSummary records + optional total count

Api/Features/PersonFile/
  PersonFileEndpoints.cs              # MapGroup("/api/persons")
  GetPersonFile/GetPersonFileEndpoint.cs
  SearchPersonFile/SearchPersonFileEndpoint.cs
  ListPersonCases/ListPersonCasesEndpoint.cs

Web/Api/PersonFile/
  IPersonFileApi.cs
  PersonFileApiClient.cs

Web/Features/PersonFile/Pages/
  PersonFilePage.razor                # @page "/persons/{PersonId:guid}"
```

### GetPersonFile

**Follow:** `GetChangeOfAddressCaseHandler` + `GetMunicipalityReportHandler` (multi-source composition)

```
Handler deps: PersonFileAuthorization, ICurrentOfficer, IPersonRepository,
               IRegistrationCaseRepository, IBirthDeclarationCaseRepository,
               IChangeOfAddressCaseRepository, IDocumentRequestCaseRepository, ...
Handle(PersonId id) OR Handle(NationalRegisterNumber nr):
  authorization.EnsureCanView(currentOfficer);   // likely PopulationOfficer only
  person = await personRepository.GetByIdAsync(...) ?? throw KeyNotFoundException
  // compose sections from existing repos / optional PersonFileQuery in Infrastructure
  return new GetPersonFileResponse(...)
```

**Endpoint routes:**
- `GET /api/persons/{personId:guid}` — primary
- `GET /api/persons/by-nr/{nrNumber}` — optional alternate lookup

**404:** throw `KeyNotFoundException` in handler (middleware → 404), same as guards.

**Reuse DTO shapes:** `PersonDto`, `BelgianAddressDto`, `HouseholdMemberDto` from `RegistrationCaseDetailDto.cs`.

### SearchPersonFile

**Follow:** `SearchNationalRegisterHandler` — phase-16 says "reuse NR search ranking"

Two approaches:
1. **Thin wrapper:** inject `SearchNationalRegisterHandler`, call it, map each match to add `PersonId?` (via `IPersonRepository.GetByRegisterRecordIdAsync` / `GetByNationalRegisterNumberAsync`) and a route like `/persons/{personId}`.
2. **Shared internal service** if you want to avoid handler-calling-handler.

**Auth:** NR search currently has none; PersonFile search should probably match case-view rules (`PopulationOfficer`) since it exposes population data links.

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/persons/search?GivenName=&FamilyName=&BirthDate=` with `[AsParameters]` + validator (copy `SearchNationalRegisterValidator` rules).

**Web:** reuse `NationalRegisterSearchForm.razor`; row action becomes "Open person file" instead of "Link".

### ListPersonCases

**Follow:** `ListRegistrationCasesHandler` + `ListChangeOfAddressCasesHandler` (list item records, auth first)

```
Handle(PersonId personId, int? skip, int? take):
  authorization.EnsureCanView(currentOfficer);
  // NEW repo methods likely needed — today only GetLatestRegisteredByPersonIdAsync exists
  // on IRegistrationCaseRepository; no cross-workflow ListByPersonId yet
  return cases.Select(c => new PersonCaseSummary(
    c.Id, "Registration", c.Status.ToString(), c.OpenedAt, c.ClosedAt, $"/registration/cases/{c.Id}"))
```

**Note:** No server-side pagination exists yet — all list handlers return full `IReadOnlyList<T>`. Phase 16 mentions pagination; you can add `skip`/`take` request params now or paginate client-side with `AppDataTable` initially.

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/persons/{personId:guid}/cases`

**Response:** `ListPersonCasesResponse(IReadOnlyList<PersonCaseSummary> Cases)` — unified across registration, birth, COA, identity docs with workflow label + deep link.

### Wiring checklist

| Step | File |
|------|------|
| Register handlers + auth | `Application/DependencyInjection.cs` |
| Map endpoints | `Api/MunicipalApiHostExtensions.cs` → `app.MapPersonFileEndpoints()` |
| Register web client | `Web/Api/DependencyInjection.cs` |
| Nav link (PopulationOfficer) | `Web/Components/Layout/MainLayout.razor` |
| Integration tests | `tests/.../Features/PersonFile/PersonFileTests.cs` |
| Docs | `docs/phases/phase-16-person-file.md` (already spec'd) |

### Existing domain hooks to leverage

- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Identity/IPersonRepository.cs` — lookup by id, NR number, register record id
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/NationalRegister/INationalRegisterRepository.cs` — search scoring
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Registration/IRegistrationCaseRepository.cs` — will need `ListByPersonIdAsync` (or Infrastructure `PersonFileQuery`)

---

## Quick comparison: Reporting vs NR search vs case GET

| Aspect | Phase 15 Reporting | Phase 5 NR search | Case GET |
|--------|-------------------|-------------------|----------|
| Auth | `ReportingAuthorization` | None | `{Case}Authorization` + Guard |
| Validation | Handler param check (`months`) | FluentValidation | Route id only |
| Response | Composed analytics DTO | List of match DTOs | Rich detail DTO |
| API group | `/api/reports` | `/api/registration/national-register` | `/api/registration/cases/{id}` |
| Web client | Dedicated `IReportingApi` | Method on `IRegistrationApi` | Method on `IRegistrationApi` |
| Tests | Handler + HTTP auth | Handler only | Handler + role boundaries |

For Phase 16, **GetPersonFile** and **ListPersonCases** align closest with **case GET/list** patterns; **SearchPersonFile** aligns closest with **NR search**, enriched with person-file navigation.
